streamProfiles.title: Stream Profiles
streamProfiles.subtitle: A separate settings set per game. The profile switches automatically when the game changes.

signal.description: For now the signal is set manually; once the connector lands it is read from the stream title.

start.title: Start
start.desktopPromo: Get the free {app} Desktop App for Windows — lower latency, local Event API and game integrations.
start.welcomeBody: Let's start your adventure! Set up your first alerts on the <tts>Text-to-Speech</tts> and <sounds>Sound Alerts</sounds> pages.
start.connectionBody: Connect your TikTok account to capture gifts, likes, follows and comments from your stream.
start.liveBodyBrowser: Browser connection is active. Keep this tab open — closing it stops the event stream.
start.liveBodyDesktop: Desktop app connected. Events are processed locally.

news.desktopApp: Desktop App — lower latency and local Event API
news.voicemod: Voicemod — change your voice with an action

start.proBody: Unlimited actions, premium overlays and AI voices with {pro}.

faq.a1: A studio that makes your TikTok LIVE interactive: it connects gifts, likes and comments to sound alerts, overlays and game actions.
faq.a2: Yes. Core features are free; unlimited actions and premium content require PRO.
faq.q3: How do I connect my TikTok account?
faq.a3: Go to Setup → Connect your TikTok account, enter your username and connect.
faq.q4: How do I find my username?
faq.a4: It's the name starting with @ on your TikTok profile — your unique username, not your display name.
faq.q5: Do I have to be live?
faq.a5: Your TikTok LIVE must be running to receive events. Use the Event Simulator to test.
faq.q6: How do I add it to OBS?
faq.a6: Copy the widget URL and add it as a Browser Source in OBS.
faq.q7: My overlay isn't showing, what should I do?
faq.a7: Check that the screen is Online, the screen number is correct and the queue isn't full.
faq.a8: Through coins, shares, chat minutes and the subscriber bonus. Configure rates in Setup → Points System.
faq.a9: We never ask for your TikTok password. We only read public stream events.
faq.a10: 1 stream profile on Free, 10 on PRO.
faq.q11: Why is there a desktop app?
faq.a11: For lower latency, the local Event API (ws://localhost:21213) and game integrations.
faq.q12: How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.a13: Join our Discord server or check the tutorials in the help menu.

start.aboutBody: {app} is an independent interaction tool for TikTok LIVE creators. It is not officially affiliated with TikTok.
start.contactBody: Join our Discord community with any questions.

gating.actionsLimit: You can create up to {limit} actions on the free plan.

preflight.title: Go-live check — something is missing
preflight.ready: All set. Your actions will fire during the live stream.
preflight.masterOff: The master switch is OFF. No action runs until you turn it on.
preflight.noUsername: TikTok username is empty. Fill in Setup → "Your TikTok name" and save — otherwise nothing ever connects to your live stream and no gift or comment reaches you.
preflight.noActions: No actions yet. Create an action first (e.g. play a sound).
preflight.noEvents: No active event. Actions do not run on their own: you must create an EVENT such as "when a gift arrives, run this action" and link it to your action.
preflight.orphanActions: These actions are not linked to any event, so they will never run: {names}
preflight.noScreen: No overlay screen is connected. Add the "Screen URL" below to OBS / TikTok LIVE Studio as a browser source.

bulkEvents.title: Set up all triggers
bulkEvents.hint: Links the action you pick to every common trigger at once — no need to create each event by hand.
bulkEvents.skipNote: Command, specific gift, emote and sticker triggers need a value only you know, so they are left out — add those manually.
bulkEvents.existingNote: Existing events are kept, never overwritten.

widget.notImplemented: This widget is not implemented yet (phase {phase}).

features.basicOverlays: Basic Overlays, Chat Commands, Games, Chatbot, Subathon Timer, TTS, Minecraft

overlays.title: Overlay Gallery
overlays.description: Here you can find general overlays for integration with OBS (Browser Source) or LIVE Studio (Link).
overlays.descriptionDetail: All functions are split into separate widgets to provide the best possible flexibility in alignment.
overlays.descriptionLiveStudio: To add overlays listed below to Live Studio, copy the URL and paste it into a new Link Source.
overlays.descriptionNote: Note: To change the color or font of overlays, click the 'Customize' button of the respective overlay.
overlays.setupWarning: Please run Setup first to create a free account!

worldCup.title: 2026 World Cup
worldCup.subtitle: Follow the World Cup live in your stream with real-time overlays and updates.
worldCup.tickerDesc: Shows current World Cup matches with score and match time.
worldCup.scheduleDesc: Overlay showing upcoming matches, teams and start times.
worldCup.standingsDesc: Displays group rankings and standings tables.

widgets.alertBoxDesc: Displays gift, follow and subscription alerts.
widgets.chatOverlayDesc: Shows TikTok live chat in OBS.
widgets.commandInfoDesc: Displays the list of active commands on screen.
widgets.subathonTimerDesc: Countdown timer that adds time based on gift subscriptions.
widgets.giftCounterDesc: Shows total gift count and coin value.
widgets.followCounterDesc: Shows live follower count in real-time.
widgets.lastFollowerDesc: Shows the list of recent followers.
widgets.leaderboardDesc: Displays the points ranking on screen.
widgets.socialRotatorDesc: Rotates your social media accounts on screen.
widgets.graphicOverlayDesc: Displays custom image or GIF on screen.

sounds.title: Sound Alerts
sounds.description: The easiest way to play sounds when you receive gifts, follows or other things.
sounds.descriptionObs: If you use OBS or Live Studio, also try Actions & Events for more advanced options.
sounds.descriptionMultiple: If you map multiple sounds to the same trigger, a sound will be randomly picked.

chatbot.description: Accepts the following commands. You can change commands and set other settings by clicking the gear icon.

chatbot.setupWarning: Please run Setup first to create a free account!

commands.helpDesc: When a viewer enters the !help command, the command info overlay shows the list of available commands.
commands.getPointsDesc: Shows the user their current points info.

commands.gameDesc: Users can play a simple game to earn points.
commands.playDesc: Users can request songs on Spotify.
commands.gambleDesc: Users can gamble with their points.
commands.watchtimeDesc: Shows the user's total watch time.
